seed_problem: Maximize total weight of satisfied clauses in a synthetic weighted CNF; checker computes satisfied weight / baseline.
mutation: input+output: generalize the boolean weighted Max-SAT to a D-symbol Max-CSP whose clauses are disjunctions of equality literals (marker == color) over a D>2 domain, and replace the all-0 baseline with the strictly stronger best-uniform-coloring baseline the checker computes. The larger domain plus the strong uniform baseline mean a single uniform color already captures a solid fraction of value, so beating it requires genuine per-marker differentiation (greedy vs coordinate-ascent vs multi-restart local search diverge) rather than blowing past a weak do-nothing point and capping.
title: Cave Mapping Expedition: Dye-Marker Corroboration
strategies: best-uniform baseline: paint every marker the single color that corroborates the most observation value (the checker's calibration point, ratio 0.1)
single-pass coordinate greedy: start from the best-uniform coloring and set each marker once to the color that maximizes currently corroborated value, ignoring later interactions
multi-restart coordinate-ascent local search: hill-climb per-marker color moves to convergence from the uniform start and several seeded random starts, keeping the best coloring
clause-weighted relaxation with conflict repair: aggregate per-marker weighted color demands, round to a coloring, then repair the heaviest still-uncorroborated observations
